exercises.title: De Morgan's Law ÔÇô Basic NOT AND
exercises.question: Apply De Morgan's Law to simplify: ┬Č(A Ôłž B)
exercises.hint: De Morgan's Law states: ┬Č(A Ôłž B) = ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB. The AND becomes OR, and each variable is negated.
exercises.explanation: By De Morgan's First Law, the complement of a conjunction is the disjunction of the complements: ┬Č(A Ôłž B) = ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB.

exercises.title: De Morgan's Law ÔÇô Basic NOT OR
exercises.question: Apply De Morgan's Law to simplify: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B)
exercises.hint: De Morgan's Law states: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) = ┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB. The OR becomes AND, and each variable is negated.
exercises.explanation: By De Morgan's Second Law, the complement of a disjunction is the conjunction of the complements: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) = ┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB.

exercises.title: De Morgan's Law ÔÇô Three Variables (AND)
exercises.question: Apply De Morgan's Law to: ┬Č(A Ôłž B Ôłž C)
acceptableAnswers: NOT A OR NOT B OR NOT C
exercises.hint: De Morgan's Law extends to multiple variables. ┬Č(A Ôłž B Ôłž C) negates each variable and changes AND to OR.
exercises.explanation: De Morgan's Law generalises to n variables: ┬Č(A Ôłž B Ôłž C) = ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB ÔłĘ ┬ČC.

exercises.title: De Morgan's Law ÔÇô Three Variables (OR)
exercises.question: Apply De Morgan's Law to: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C)
acceptableAnswers: NOT A AND NOT B AND NOT C
exercises.hint: De Morgan's Law extends to multiple variables. ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C) negates each variable and changes OR to AND.
exercises.explanation: De Morgan's Law generalises: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C) = ┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB Ôłž ┬ČC.

exercises.title: De Morgan's with Nested Expression
exercises.question: Simplify using De Morgan's Law: ┬Č(A Ôłž (B ÔłĘ C))
acceptableAnswers: NOT A OR (NOT B AND NOT C)
NOT A OR NOT B AND NOT C
exercises.hint: First apply De Morgan's to the outer ┬ČAND, then apply De Morgan's again to the inner ┬Č(B ÔłĘ C).
exercises.explanation: First: ┬Č(A Ôłž (B ÔłĘ C)) = ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬Č(B ÔłĘ C). Then apply De Morgan's again: ┬Č(B ÔłĘ C) = ┬ČB Ôłž ┬ČC. Result: ┬ČA ÔłĘ (┬ČB Ôłž ┬ČC).

exercises.title: De Morgan's with Nested OR
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č((A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž C)
acceptableAnswers: (NOT A AND NOT B) OR NOT C
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's to the outer AND first, then simplify the ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) using De Morgan's again.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č((A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž C) = ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ ┬ČC = (┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ ┬ČC.

exercises.title: De Morgan's ÔÇô Double Application
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(┬Č(A) Ôłž B)
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's: ┬Č(X Ôłž Y) = ┬ČX ÔłĘ ┬ČY. Then ┬Č(┬ČA) simplifies to A by double negation.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(┬ČA Ôłž B) = ┬Č(┬ČA) ÔłĘ ┬ČB = A ÔłĘ ┬ČB (using double negation: ┬Č┬ČA = A).

exercises.title: De Morgan's ÔÇô Double Application (OR)
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ ┬Č(B))
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's: ┬Č(X ÔłĘ Y) = ┬ČX Ôłž ┬ČY. Then ┬Č(┬ČB) = B.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ ┬ČB) = ┬ČA Ôłž ┬Č(┬ČB) = ┬ČA Ôłž B.

exercises.title: De Morgan's ÔÇô Complex Nested
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č((A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (C Ôłž D))
acceptableAnswers: (NOT A OR NOT B) AND (NOT C OR NOT D)
exercises.hint: First apply De Morgan's to the outer OR, then apply De Morgan's to each inner AND.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č((A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (C Ôłž D)) = ┬Č(A Ôłž B) Ôłž ┬Č(C Ôłž D) = (┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB) Ôłž (┬ČC ÔłĘ ┬ČD).

exercises.title: De Morgan's ÔÇô Complex with Complement
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž ┬Č(C ÔłĘ D))
acceptableAnswers: A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C ÔłĘ D
A OR B OR C OR D
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's to the outer AND, then use double negation to remove the double NOTs.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(┬Č(AÔłĘB) Ôłž ┬Č(CÔłĘD)) = ┬Č┬Č(AÔłĘB) ÔłĘ ┬Č┬Č(CÔłĘD) = (AÔłĘB) ÔłĘ (CÔłĘD) = AÔłĘBÔłĘCÔłĘD.

exercises.title: De Morgan's ÔÇô Verify Equivalence
exercises.question: Show that ┬Č(A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ ┬Č(C Ôłž D) is equivalent to a simpler form. Simplify: ┬Č((A Ôłž B) Ôłž (C Ôłž D))
exercises.expression: ┬Č(A Ôłž B Ôłž C Ôłž D)
acceptableAnswers: NOT A OR NOT B OR NOT C OR NOT D
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's directly to a four-variable AND expression.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(A Ôłž B Ôłž C Ôłž D) = ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB ÔłĘ ┬ČC ÔłĘ ┬ČD.

exercises.title: Identify the Law
exercises.question: Which Boolean law is demonstrated by the equivalence: ┬Č(P ÔłĘ Q) = ┬ČP Ôłž ┬ČQ?
exercises.hint: This law shows how a NOT distributes over an OR by changing it to AND and negating each term.
exercises.explanation: This is De Morgan's Second Law: the complement of a disjunction equals the conjunction of the complements.

exercises.title: De Morgan's ÔÇô Mixed Operations
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(A Ôłž B) Ôłž ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B)
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's to both terms separately. Then look for absorption.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(AÔłžB) Ôłž ┬Č(AÔłĘB) = (┬ČAÔłĘ┬ČB) Ôłž (┬ČAÔłž┬ČB). Since (┬ČAÔłž┬ČB) implies (┬ČAÔłĘ┬ČB), by absorption this simplifies to ┬ČAÔłž┬ČB.

exercises.title: De Morgan's ÔÇô Reverse Application
exercises.question: Express using a single NOT: (┬ČA) ÔłĘ (┬ČB)
exercises.hint: De Morgan's Law can be applied in reverse. ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB can be written as ┬Č(? ? ?).
exercises.explanation: By De Morgan's First Law in reverse: ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB = ┬Č(A Ôłž B).

exercises.title: De Morgan's ÔÇô Reverse Application (AND)
exercises.question: Express using a single NOT: (┬ČA) Ôłž (┬ČB)
exercises.hint: De Morgan's Law can be applied in reverse. ┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB can be written as ┬Č(? ? ?).
exercises.explanation: By De Morgan's Second Law in reverse: ┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB = ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B).

exercises.title: Distributive Law ÔÇô AND over OR
exercises.question: Expand using the Distributive Law: A Ôłž (B ÔłĘ C)
exercises.hint: The Distributive Law works like expanding brackets in algebra: A(B+C) = AB + AC.
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž (B ÔłĘ C) = (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C). This is analogous to algebraic expansion.

exercises.title: Distributive Law ÔÇô OR over AND
exercises.question: Expand: A ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C)
exercises.hint: In Boolean algebra, OR also distributes over AND: A + BC = (A+B)(A+C).
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C) = (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ C). Unlike normal algebra, OR distributes over AND in Boolean algebra.

exercises.title: Distributive Law ÔÇô Factoring
exercises.question: Factorise: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C)
exercises.hint: Look for a common factor in both terms. What variable appears in both (A Ôłž B) and (A Ôłž C)?
exercises.explanation: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) = A Ôłž (B ÔłĘ C). Factor out the common variable A.

exercises.title: Distributive Law ÔÇô Three Terms
exercises.question: Factorise: (X Ôłž Y) ÔłĘ (X Ôłž Z) ÔłĘ (X Ôłž W)
exercises.expression: (X Ôłž Y) ÔłĘ (X Ôłž Z) ÔłĘ (X Ôłž W)
exercises.answer: X Ôłž (Y ÔłĘ Z ÔłĘ W)
acceptableAnswers: X Ôłž (Y ÔłĘ Z ÔłĘ W)
X AND (Y OR Z OR W)
exercises.hint: X is common to all three terms. Factor it out.
exercises.explanation: (XÔłžY) ÔłĘ (XÔłžZ) ÔłĘ (XÔłžW) = X Ôłž (Y ÔłĘ Z ÔłĘ W).

exercises.title: Distributive + Complement
exercises.question: Simplify: A Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ B)
exercises.hint: Distribute A over the OR, then use the Complement Law: A Ôłž ┬ČA = 0.
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ B) = (A Ôłž ┬ČA) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) = 0 ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) = A Ôłž B.

exercises.title: Distributive ÔÇô Expand and Simplify
exercises.question: Simplify: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ ┬ČB)
exercises.hint: Use the Distributive Law (OR over AND) in reverse, then apply the Complement Law.
exercises.explanation: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ ┬ČB) = A ÔłĘ (B Ôłž ┬ČB) = A ÔłĘ 0 = A.

exercises.title: Distributive ÔÇô Two Different Factors
exercises.question: Expand: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (C ÔłĘ D)
exercises.answer: (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž D) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž D)
acceptableAnswers: (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž D) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž D)
exercises.hint: Distribute each term in the first bracket over each term in the second bracket, like FOIL in algebra.
exercises.explanation: (AÔłĘB) Ôłž (CÔłĘD) = (AÔłžC) ÔłĘ (AÔłžD) ÔłĘ (BÔłžC) ÔłĘ (BÔłžD).

exercises.title: Distributive ÔÇô Simplify After Expansion
exercises.question: Simplify: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ B)
exercises.hint: Factor out B using the Distributive Law (OR over AND) in reverse.
exercises.explanation: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ B) = B ÔłĘ (A Ôłž ┬ČA) = B ÔłĘ 0 = B.

exercises.title: Distributive ÔÇô Factor with Complement
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B)
exercises.hint: Factor out B from both terms.
exercises.explanation: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) = (A ÔłĘ ┬ČA) Ôłž B = 1 Ôłž B = B.

exercises.title: Distributive ÔÇô Complex Factoring
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž ┬ČC)
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž B Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž ┬ČC)
exercises.hint: Factor out the common A Ôłž B from both terms.
exercises.explanation: (AÔłžBÔłžC) ÔłĘ (AÔłžBÔłž┬ČC) = (AÔłžB) Ôłž (C ÔłĘ ┬ČC) = (AÔłžB) Ôłž 1 = AÔłžB.

exercises.title: Distributive Law ÔÇô Right-side Factor
exercises.question: Expand using the Distributive Law: (B ÔłĘ C) Ôłž A
exercises.hint: By commutativity, (B ÔłĘ C) Ôłž A = A Ôłž (B ÔłĘ C). Now distribute.
exercises.explanation: (B ÔłĘ C) Ôłž A = A Ôłž (B ÔłĘ C) = (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C).

exercises.title: Distributive ÔÇô Consensus Theorem Setup
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C)
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C)
acceptableAnswers: (A AND B) OR (NOT A AND C)
exercises.hint: The third term (B Ôłž C) is redundant. This is the Consensus Theorem: AB + A'C + BC = AB + A'C.
exercises.explanation: BÔłžC = BÔłžCÔłž(AÔłĘ┬ČA) = (AÔłžBÔłžC) ÔłĘ (┬ČAÔłžBÔłžC). The first part is absorbed by AÔłžB and the second by ┬ČAÔłžC. So (BÔłžC) is redundant.

exercises.title: Absorption Law ÔÇô Basic (OR)
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B)
exercises.hint: The Absorption Law states: A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) = A. The second term is 'absorbed' by the first.
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) = A. If A is true, the whole expression is true. If A is false, both terms are false.

exercises.title: Absorption Law ÔÇô Basic (AND)
exercises.question: Simplify: A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B)
exercises.hint: The Absorption Law states: A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = A.
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = A. This is the dual form of the Absorption Law.

exercises.title: Absorption Law ÔÇô Reversed Order
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ A
exercises.hint: By commutativity of OR, this is the same as A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B). Apply Absorption.
exercises.explanation: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ A = A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) = A.

exercises.title: Absorption Law ÔÇô With Complement
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B)
exercises.hint: This is a variant of absorption. Distribute to get (A ÔłĘ ┬ČA) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B), then simplify.
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) = (A ÔłĘ ┬ČA) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = 1 Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = A ÔłĘ B.

exercises.title: Absorption ÔÇô Three Variables
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž C)
exercises.expression: A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž C)
exercises.hint: The Absorption Law works regardless of how many variables are ANDed with A.
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž C) = A. A absorbs any conjunction that includes A.

exercises.title: Absorption ÔÇô Recognise Pattern
exercises.question: Simplify: (X Ôłž Y) ÔłĘ (X Ôłž Y Ôłž Z)
exercises.expression: (X Ôłž Y) ÔłĘ (X Ôłž Y Ôłž Z)
exercises.hint: X Ôłž Y absorbs X Ôłž Y Ôłž Z, since the second term is a subset of the first.
exercises.explanation: (XÔłžY) ÔłĘ (XÔłžYÔłžZ) = XÔłžY. The more specific term is absorbed by the more general one.

exercises.title: Absorption ÔÇô Hidden Pattern
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž ┬ČC) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž C)
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž ┬ČC) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž C)
exercises.hint: The first term A Ôłž B absorbs both other terms since they are more specific.
exercises.explanation: Both (AÔłžBÔłž┬ČC) and (AÔłžBÔłžC) are absorbed by (AÔłžB). Result: AÔłžB.

exercises.title: Absorption ÔÇô AND Form
exercises.question: Simplify: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C)
exercises.expression: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C)
exercises.hint: By the dual Absorption Law: X Ôłž (X ÔłĘ Y) = X. Here X = A ÔłĘ B.
exercises.explanation: (AÔłĘB) Ôłž (AÔłĘBÔłĘC) = AÔłĘB. The more restrictive clause absorbs the less restrictive one.

exercises.title: Absorption + Complement Simplification
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB)
exercises.expression: A ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB)
exercises.hint: Factor ┬ČA from the last two terms, then simplify.
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB) = A ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž (B ÔłĘ ┬ČB)) = A ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž 1) = A ÔłĘ ┬ČA = 1.

exercises.title: Identify Absorption Law
exercises.question: Which law simplifies A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) to A?
exercises.hint: This law is named after the idea that one term 'absorbs' the other.
exercises.explanation: The Absorption Law: A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) = A and its dual A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = A.

exercises.title: Identity Law ÔÇô OR with 0
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ 0
exercises.hint: 0 is the identity element for OR. ORing with 0 doesn't change the value.
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ 0 = A. Zero is the identity element for the OR operation.

exercises.title: Identity Law ÔÇô AND with 1
exercises.question: Simplify: A Ôłž 1
exercises.hint: 1 is the identity element for AND. ANDing with 1 doesn't change the value.
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž 1 = A. One is the identity element for the AND operation.

exercises.title: Null Law ÔÇô OR with 1
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ 1
exercises.hint: Anything ORed with 1 gives 1. This is the Null (Domination) Law for OR.
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ 1 = 1. One is the annihilator for the OR operation.

exercises.title: Null Law ÔÇô AND with 0
exercises.question: Simplify: A Ôłž 0
exercises.hint: Anything ANDed with 0 gives 0. This is the Null (Domination) Law for AND.
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž 0 = 0. Zero is the annihilator for the AND operation.

exercises.title: Idempotent Law ÔÇô OR
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ A
exercises.hint: ORing a variable with itself gives the same variable. This is the Idempotent Law.
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ A = A. This is the Idempotent Law for OR.

exercises.title: Idempotent Law ÔÇô AND
exercises.question: Simplify: A Ôłž A
exercises.hint: ANDing a variable with itself gives the same variable. This is the Idempotent Law.
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž A = A. This is the Idempotent Law for AND.

exercises.title: Combined Identity Laws
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž 1) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž 0)
exercises.hint: Apply Identity Law to the first term and Null Law to the second term.
exercises.explanation: (A Ôłž 1) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž 0) = A ÔłĘ 0 = A.

exercises.title: Idempotent with Extra Terms
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ A ÔłĘ B
exercises.hint: First apply the Idempotent Law to A ÔłĘ A.
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ A ÔłĘ B = A ÔłĘ B (by Idempotent Law: A ÔłĘ A = A).

exercises.title: Null Law in Context
exercises.question: Simplify: (A ÔłĘ 1) Ôłž B
exercises.hint: First simplify A ÔłĘ 1 using the Null Law, then apply the Identity Law.
exercises.explanation: (A ÔłĘ 1) Ôłž B = 1 Ôłž B = B.

exercises.title: Identify the Law ÔÇô Idempotent
exercises.question: Which law is demonstrated by: A Ôłž A Ôłž A = A?
exercises.expression: A Ôłž A Ôłž A = A
exercises.hint: This law says that performing the same operation with the same value repeatedly gives the same result.
exercises.explanation: The Idempotent Law: A Ôłž A = A and A ÔłĘ A = A. It extends to any number of repetitions.

exercises.title: Commutative Law ÔÇô AND
exercises.question: Rewrite using the Commutative Law: B Ôłž A
exercises.hint: The Commutative Law says the order doesn't matter for AND and OR.
exercises.explanation: B Ôłž A = A Ôłž B. The order of operands doesn't affect the result.

exercises.title: Commutative Law ÔÇô OR
exercises.question: Rewrite using the Commutative Law: C ÔłĘ A
exercises.hint: The Commutative Law says the order doesn't matter.
exercises.explanation: C ÔłĘ A = A ÔłĘ C.

exercises.title: Associative Law ÔÇô AND
exercises.question: Rewrite using the Associative Law: (A Ôłž B) Ôłž C
exercises.hint: The Associative Law says you can change the grouping of AND or OR.
exercises.explanation: (A Ôłž B) Ôłž C = A Ôłž (B Ôłž C). Grouping doesn't affect the result.

exercises.title: Associative Law ÔÇô OR
exercises.question: Rewrite using the Associative Law: (A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ C
exercises.hint: The Associative Law says you can change the grouping.
exercises.explanation: (A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ C = A ÔłĘ (B ÔłĘ C).

exercises.title: Reorder to Simplify
exercises.question: Use Commutative and Associative laws to simplify: B Ôłž A Ôłž ┬ČB
exercises.hint: Rearrange to group B Ôłž ┬ČB together, then apply the Complement Law.
exercises.explanation: B Ôłž A Ôłž ┬ČB = A Ôłž (B Ôłž ┬ČB) = A Ôłž 0 = 0.

exercises.title: Reorder to Simplify (OR)
exercises.question: Use Commutative and Associative laws to simplify: B ÔłĘ A ÔłĘ ┬ČB
exercises.hint: Rearrange to group B ÔłĘ ┬ČB together.
exercises.explanation: B ÔłĘ A ÔłĘ ┬ČB = A ÔłĘ (B ÔłĘ ┬ČB) = A ÔłĘ 1 = 1.

exercises.title: Identify ÔÇô Associative vs Commutative
exercises.question: Which law is demonstrated by: (A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ C = A ÔłĘ (B ÔłĘ C)?
exercises.expression: (A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ C = A ÔłĘ (B ÔłĘ C)
exercises.hint: This law is about changing the grouping (brackets), not the order.
exercises.explanation: The Associative Law allows regrouping: (A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ C = A ÔłĘ (B ÔłĘ C).

exercises.title: Identify ÔÇô Commutative Law
exercises.question: Which law is demonstrated by: A Ôłž B = B Ôłž A?
exercises.expression: A Ôłž B = B Ôłž A
exercises.hint: This law is about changing the order of operands.
exercises.explanation: The Commutative Law: A Ôłž B = B Ôłž A. The order of operands doesn't matter.

exercises.title: Complement Law ÔÇô AND
exercises.question: Simplify: A Ôłž ┬ČA
exercises.hint: A variable ANDed with its complement always gives 0 (false).
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž ┬ČA = 0. A variable cannot be both true and false simultaneously.

exercises.title: Complement Law ÔÇô OR
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ ┬ČA
exercises.hint: A variable ORed with its complement always gives 1 (true).
exercises.explanation: A ÔłĘ ┬ČA = 1. A variable is always either true or false.

exercises.title: Complement in Expression
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž ┬ČA) ÔłĘ B
exercises.hint: First simplify A Ôłž ┬ČA using the Complement Law, then apply the Identity Law.
exercises.explanation: (A Ôłž ┬ČA) ÔłĘ B = 0 ÔłĘ B = B.

exercises.title: Complement ÔÇô Both Forms
exercises.question: Simplify: (A ÔłĘ ┬ČA) Ôłž (B Ôłž ┬ČB)
exercises.hint: Simplify each bracket using the Complement Law, then combine.
exercises.explanation: (A ÔłĘ ┬ČA) Ôłž (B Ôłž ┬ČB) = 1 Ôłž 0 = 0.

exercises.title: Complement with Multiple Variables
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB)
exercises.hint: Recognise that (┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB) = ┬Č(A Ôłž B) by De Morgan's Law.
exercises.explanation: (A Ôłž B) Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB) = (A Ôłž B) Ôłž ┬Č(A Ôłž B) = 0.

exercises.title: Complement ÔÇô Hidden
exercises.question: Simplify: A Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB)
exercises.expression: A Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB)
exercises.hint: First simplify A Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ B) using distribution, then continue.
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ B) = AÔłžB. Then AÔłžB Ôłž (┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB) = AÔłžB Ôłž ┬Č(AÔłžB) = 0.

exercises.title: Complement ÔÇô OR Form Hidden
exercises.question: Simplify: (A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB)
exercises.hint: Recognise that (┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB) = ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) by De Morgan's Law.
exercises.explanation: (A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB) = (A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) = 1.

exercises.title: NOT of Constants
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č1
exercises.hint: The complement of 1 (true) is 0 (false).
exercises.explanation: ┬Č1 = 0. The complement of true is false.

exercises.title: NOT of Zero
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č0
exercises.hint: The complement of 0 (false) is 1 (true).
exercises.explanation: ┬Č0 = 1. The complement of false is true.

exercises.title: Complement ÔÇô Complex Expression
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž ┬ČC) ÔłĘ (┬ČA)
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž B Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž ┬ČC) ÔłĘ ┬ČA
exercises.hint: Factor (A Ôłž B) from the first two terms, use Complement Law, then simplify with ┬ČA.
exercises.explanation: (AÔłžBÔłžC) ÔłĘ (AÔłžBÔłž┬ČC) ÔłĘ ┬ČA = AÔłžBÔłž(CÔłĘ┬ČC) ÔłĘ ┬ČA = AÔłžB ÔłĘ ┬ČA = ┬ČA ÔłĘ B (by absorption variant).

exercises.title: Double Negation ÔÇô Basic
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(┬ČA)
exercises.hint: Two NOTs cancel each other out.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(┬ČA) = A. The double negation (involution) law.

exercises.title: Double Negation ÔÇô In Expression
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(┬ČA) Ôłž B
exercises.hint: First simplify ┬Č(┬ČA) using double negation.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(┬ČA) Ôłž B = A Ôłž B.

exercises.title: Triple Negation
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(┬Č(┬ČA))
exercises.hint: Apply double negation from the inside out, or note that three NOTs = one NOT.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(┬Č(┬ČA)) = ┬ČA. An odd number of negations gives a single negation.

exercises.title: Double Negation + De Morgan's
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(┬Č(A Ôłž B))
exercises.hint: Double negation cancels out, regardless of what's inside.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(┬Č(A Ôłž B)) = A Ôłž B. The double negation cancels.

exercises.title: Quadruple Negation
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(┬Č(┬Č(┬ČA)))
exercises.hint: Four NOTs cancel out (even number of negations).
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(┬Č(┬Č(┬ČA))) = ┬Č(┬ČA) = A. An even number of negations cancels completely.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Factor and Reduce
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B)
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B)
exercises.hint: Factor A from the first two terms to get A, then combine with the third term.
exercises.explanation: (AÔłžB) ÔłĘ (AÔłž┬ČB) = AÔłž(BÔłĘ┬ČB) = A. Then A ÔłĘ (┬ČAÔłžB) = A ÔłĘ B.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô De Morgan's + Simplify
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ A
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's first, then simplify using Absorption variant.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(AÔłĘB) ÔłĘ A = (┬ČAÔłž┬ČB) ÔłĘ A = A ÔłĘ ┬ČB (by absorption variant).

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Expand then Reduce
exercises.question: Simplify: A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C)
exercises.expression: A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C)
exercises.hint: This is a direct application of the Absorption Law.
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C) = A (by Absorption).

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Four Minterms
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB)
exercises.hint: Factor: first two terms give A, last two give ┬ČA. Then A ÔłĘ ┬ČA = ?
exercises.explanation: (AÔłžB)ÔłĘ(AÔłž┬ČB) = A. (┬ČAÔłžB)ÔłĘ(┬ČAÔłž┬ČB) = ┬ČA. A ÔłĘ ┬ČA = 1.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Complex Expression
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž ┬ČB)
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's to the first term, then simplify.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(AÔłžB) ÔłĘ (AÔłž┬ČB) = (┬ČAÔłĘ┬ČB) ÔłĘ (AÔłž┬ČB) = ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB (since AÔłž┬ČB is absorbed by ┬ČB).

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Triple Variable Simplification
exercises.question: Simplify: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ C) Ôłž (B ÔłĘ C)
exercises.expression: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ C) Ôłž (B ÔłĘ C)
exercises.answer: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C)
acceptableAnswers: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C)
(A AND B) OR (A AND C) OR (B AND C)
exercises.hint: First expand (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ C) using distribution, then AND with (B ÔłĘ C).
exercises.explanation: (AÔłĘB)Ôłž(AÔłĘC) = AÔłĘ(BÔłžC). Then (AÔłĘ(BÔłžC))Ôłž(BÔłĘC) = (AÔłžB)ÔłĘ(AÔłžC)ÔłĘ(BÔłžC).

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Redundant Terms
exercises.question: Simplify: A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C)
exercises.expression: A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C)
exercises.hint: Apply Absorption: A absorbs any term that includes A.
exercises.explanation: A absorbs (AÔłžB) and (AÔłžC). Result: A.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Complex with De Morgan's
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č(┬ČA Ôłž ┬ČB) Ôłž ┬Č(┬ČA Ôłž B)
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's to each ┬Č(...) term, then simplify.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(┬ČAÔłž┬ČB) = AÔłĘB. ┬Č(┬ČAÔłžB) = AÔłĘ┬ČB. (AÔłĘB)Ôłž(AÔłĘ┬ČB) = AÔłĘ(BÔłž┬ČB) = AÔłĘ0 = A.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Working Backwards
exercises.question: Simplify: (┬ČA ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B)
exercises.hint: Factor out B using the Distributive Law (OR over AND) in reverse.
exercises.explanation: (┬ČA ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = B ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž A) = B ÔłĘ 0 = B.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Five-Term Simplification
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž A)
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ A ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž A)
exercises.hint: All other terms contain A and are absorbed by the standalone A.
exercises.explanation: A absorbs (AÔłžB), (AÔłžC), and (BÔłžA). (AÔłžB) and (BÔłžA) are the same by commutativity. Result: A.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô NOT Distribution
exercises.question: Simplify: ┬Č((A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (C ÔłĘ D)) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B)
exercises.expression: ┬Č((A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (C ÔłĘ D)) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B)
acceptableAnswers: (A OR B) AND NOT C AND NOT D
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's to the NOT term, then simplify using absorption/complement.
exercises.explanation: Let X = AÔłĘB, Y = CÔłĘD. ┬Č(XÔłžY)ÔłžX = (┬ČXÔłĘ┬ČY)ÔłžX = (XÔłž┬ČX)ÔłĘ(XÔłž┬ČY) = 0ÔłĘ(XÔłž┬ČY) = XÔłž┬ČY = (AÔłĘB)Ôłž┬Č(CÔłĘD) = (AÔłĘB)Ôłž┬ČCÔłž┬ČD.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Repeated Variable
exercises.question: Simplify: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž A
exercises.hint: This is the Absorption Law: A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = A.
exercises.explanation: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž A = A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = A.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô XOR Expansion
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B)
acceptableAnswers: (A AND NOT B) OR (NOT A AND B)
exercises.hint: This expression is the definition of XOR (exclusive OR). It cannot be further simplified using basic Boolean laws.
exercises.explanation: (A Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) = A ÔŐĽ B. This is the canonical form of XOR.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Challenging Reduction
exercises.question: Simplify: (A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ ┬ČB) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ ┬ČC)
exercises.expression: (A ÔłĘ B ÔłĘ C) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ ┬ČB) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ ┬ČC)
exercises.hint: Start by combining the last two terms: (A ÔłĘ ┬ČB) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ ┬ČC) = A ÔłĘ (┬ČB Ôłž ┬ČC).
exercises.explanation: (AÔłĘ┬ČB)Ôłž(AÔłĘ┬ČC) = AÔłĘ(┬ČBÔłž┬ČC) = AÔłĘ┬Č(BÔłĘC). Then (AÔłĘBÔłĘC)Ôłž(AÔłĘ┬Č(BÔłĘC)) = AÔłĘ((BÔłĘC)Ôłž┬Č(BÔłĘC)) = AÔłĘ0 = A.

exercises.title: Multi-step ÔÇô Identity Clean-up
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž 1) ÔłĘ (0 Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B)
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž 1) ÔłĘ (0 Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B)
exercises.hint: Apply Identity and Null laws to the first two terms, then use Absorption.
exercises.explanation: (AÔłž1) ÔłĘ (0ÔłžB) ÔłĘ (AÔłžB) = A ÔłĘ 0 ÔłĘ (AÔłžB) = A ÔłĘ (AÔłžB) = A.

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Simplify Expression
exercises.question: Simplify the following Boolean expression, showing each law used: A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B)
exercises.hint: This is a direct application of the Absorption Law.
exercises.explanation: A Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = A [Absorption Law]. In CIE exams, you must name the law used at each step.

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Two-Step Simplification
exercises.question: Simplify, naming the law at each step: ┬Č(┬ČA ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ B
exercises.hint: Step 1: Apply De Morgan's to ┬Č(┬ČA ÔłĘ B). Step 2: Simplify using known laws.
exercises.explanation: Step 1: ┬Č(┬ČA ÔłĘ B) = A Ôłž ┬ČB [De Morgan's + Double Negation]. Step 2: (A Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ B = A ÔłĘ B [Absorption variant].

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Three-Step Simplification
exercises.question: Simplify, showing all working: ┬Č(A Ôłž B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B)
acceptableAnswers: (A AND NOT B) OR (NOT A AND B)
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's, then distribute. The result is the XOR function.
exercises.explanation: ┬Č(AÔłžB) Ôłž (AÔłĘB) = (┬ČAÔłĘ┬ČB) Ôłž (AÔłĘB). Expanding: (┬ČAÔłžA)ÔłĘ(┬ČAÔłžB)ÔłĘ(┬ČBÔłžA)ÔłĘ(┬ČBÔłžB) = 0ÔłĘ(┬ČAÔłžB)ÔłĘ(AÔłž┬ČB)ÔłĘ0 = (AÔłž┬ČB)ÔłĘ(┬ČAÔłžB) = AÔŐĽB.

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Truth Table Verification
exercises.question: Verify using a truth table that ┬Č(A Ôłž B) = ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB. What are the output values for the four input combinations (A=0,B=0), (A=0,B=1), (A=1,B=0), (A=1,B=1)?
exercises.hint: Evaluate ┬Č(A Ôłž B) for each combination: (0,0)Ôćĺ┬Č(0)=1, (0,1)Ôćĺ┬Č(0)=1, (1,0)Ôćĺ┬Č(0)=1, (1,1)Ôćĺ┬Č(1)=0.
exercises.lawUsed: De Morgan's First Law (Truth Table Proof)
exercises.explanation: For all four input combinations, ┬Č(A Ôłž B) and ┬ČA ÔłĘ ┬ČB produce identical outputs: 1, 1, 1, 0. This verifies De Morgan's First Law.

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô SOP to Simplified
exercises.question: Simplify the Sum of Products: A'BC + AB'C + ABC' + ABC
exercises.expression: ┬ČAÔłžBÔłžC ÔłĘ AÔłž┬ČBÔłžC ÔłĘ AÔłžBÔłž┬ČC ÔłĘ AÔłžBÔłžC
exercises.answer: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C)
acceptableAnswers: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C)
(A AND B) OR (A AND C) OR (B AND C)
exercises.hint: Group terms that differ by one variable. ABC pairs with each of the other three terms.
exercises.explanation: Pair ABC with A'BC: BC(AÔłĘ┬ČA) = BC. Pair ABC with AB'C: AC(BÔłĘ┬ČB) = AC. Pair ABC with ABC': AB(CÔłĘ┬ČC) = AB. Result: AB ÔłĘ AC ÔłĘ BC.

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Named Law Application
exercises.question: State which Boolean law simplifies the expression A ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) to A ÔłĘ B.
exercises.expression: A ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) = A ÔłĘ B
exercises.hint: This is a well-known simplification pattern. Think about how A 'absorbs' part of the second term.
exercises.explanation: This is the complement variant of the Absorption Law. Proof: A ÔłĘ (┬ČAÔłžB) = (AÔłĘ┬ČA)Ôłž(AÔłĘB) = 1Ôłž(AÔłĘB) = AÔłĘB.

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Logic Gate to Expression
exercises.question: A logic circuit has inputs A, B, C. The output X = ┬Č((A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ C). Simplify ┬Č((A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ C).
acceptableAnswers: (NOT A OR NOT B) AND NOT C
exercises.hint: Apply De Morgan's to the outer ┬ČOR, then apply De Morgan's to ┬Č(A Ôłž B).
exercises.explanation: ┬Č((AÔłžB)ÔłĘC) = ┬Č(AÔłžB) Ôłž ┬ČC [De Morgan's] = (┬ČAÔłĘ┬ČB) Ôłž ┬ČC [De Morgan's].

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Prove Equivalence
exercises.question: Prove algebraically that ┬Č(A) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = ┬Č(A) Ôłž B
exercises.hint: Distribute ┬ČA over the OR, then use the Complement Law.
exercises.explanation: ┬ČA Ôłž (A ÔłĘ B) = (┬ČA Ôłž A) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) [Distributive] = 0 ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) [Complement] = ┬ČA Ôłž B [Identity].

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Redundancy Elimination
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž C) ÔłĘ B
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B Ôłž C) ÔłĘ B
exercises.hint: B absorbs both (A Ôłž B) and (A Ôłž B Ôłž C).
exercises.explanation: B absorbs (AÔłžB) and (AÔłžBÔłžC) since both require B to be true. Result: B.

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô NAND Expression
exercises.question: Express using only NAND: The expression ┬Č(A) can be written as A NAND A. Write (┬ČA) Ôłž (┬ČB) using NAND notation.
acceptableAnswers: NOT((A NAND A) NAND (B NAND B)) NAND NOT((A NAND A) NAND (B NAND B))
┬Č((A NAND A) NAND (B NAND B)) NAND ┬Č((A NAND A) NAND (B NAND B))
exercises.hint: ┬ČA = A NAND A. Then X Ôłž Y = ┬Č(X NAND Y) = (X NAND Y) NAND (X NAND Y). But more directly, De Morgan's gives ┬ČAÔłž┬ČB = ┬Č(AÔłĘB). Think step by step.
exercises.explanation: ┬ČA = AÔćĹA. ┬ČB = BÔćĹB. ┬ČAÔłž┬ČB: Let P=AÔćĹA, Q=BÔćĹB. PÔłžQ = ┬Č(PÔćĹQ) ÔÇö but we need this as NAND. Actually (AÔćĹA)ÔćĹ(BÔćĹB) = ┬Č(┬ČAÔłž┬ČB) = AÔłĘB. So we need ┬Č(AÔłĘB). Hmm, the direct NAND implementation of ┬ČAÔłž┬ČB = ((AÔćĹA)ÔćĹ(BÔćĹB))ÔćĹ((AÔćĹA)ÔćĹ(BÔćĹB)).

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Product of Sums
exercises.question: Convert to Sum of Products form: (A ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ ┬ČB)
exercises.hint: Factor out A using the Distributive Law (OR over AND), then use the Complement Law.
exercises.explanation: (AÔłĘB) Ôłž (AÔłĘ┬ČB) = A ÔłĘ (BÔłž┬ČB) = A ÔłĘ 0 = A.

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Full Simplification Chain
exercises.question: Simplify fully, showing each step: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ A
exercises.expression: ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ A
exercises.hint: A absorbs (A Ôłž B). Then simplify ┬Č(A ÔłĘ B) ÔłĘ A using De Morgan's and absorption.
exercises.explanation: Step 1: A absorbs (AÔłžB): expression becomes ┬Č(AÔłĘB) ÔłĘ A. Step 2: (┬ČAÔłž┬ČB) ÔłĘ A = A ÔłĘ ┬ČB [absorption variant].

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Exam Question Format
exercises.question: A processor uses the Boolean expression X = (A Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) to control a flag. Simplify X.
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B)
exercises.hint: Group the last two terms: (┬ČA Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž B) = B. Then simplify (A Ôłž ┬ČB) ÔłĘ B.
exercises.explanation: (┬ČAÔłžB) ÔłĘ (AÔłžB) = BÔłž(┬ČAÔłĘA) = B. Then (AÔłž┬ČB) ÔłĘ B = A ÔłĘ B.

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Four Variable
exercises.question: Simplify: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B Ôłž C)
exercises.expression: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (┬ČA Ôłž B Ôłž C)
exercises.answer: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C)
acceptableAnswers: (A Ôłž B) ÔłĘ (A Ôłž C) ÔłĘ (B Ôłž C)
(A AND B) OR (A AND C) OR (B AND C)
exercises.hint: Note that ┬ČAÔłžBÔłžC can be rewritten. Add and subtract AÔłžBÔłžC to create a useful pattern.
exercises.explanation: Actually (AÔłžB)ÔłĘ(AÔłžC)ÔłĘ(┬ČAÔłžBÔłžC). Since AÔłžBÔłžC is absorbed by both AÔłžB and AÔłžC, we can add it: expression = (AÔłžB)ÔłĘ(AÔłžC)ÔłĘ(AÔłžBÔłžC)ÔłĘ(┬ČAÔłžBÔłžC) = (AÔłžB)ÔłĘ(AÔłžC)ÔłĘ(BÔłžC).

exercises.title: CIE Style ÔÇô Final Challenge
exercises.question: Simplify completely: ┬Č((┬ČA ÔłĘ B) Ôłž (A ÔłĘ ┬ČB))
acceptableAnswers: (A AND NOT B) OR (NOT A AND B)
exercises.hint: First expand the inner expression, then apply De Morgan's. The result is a well-known function.
exercises.explanation: (┬ČAÔłĘB)Ôłž(AÔłĘ┬ČB) is XNOR (equivalence). Its complement is XOR. So ┬Č((┬ČAÔłĘB)Ôłž(AÔłĘ┬ČB)) = (AÔłž┬ČB)ÔłĘ(┬ČAÔłžB) = AÔŐĽB.
